features: ESSENTIAL SKIN CARE: Nuage Aqueous Lotion is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round.
GENTLE: Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous lotion is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use.
SKIN COMFORT: Nuage Aqueous Lotion is a non-greasy moisturiser. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months.
LIPS & SKIN: Suitable for use on the body and to treat and prevent dry chapped lips
description: Nuage Aqueous Lotion is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round. Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous lotion is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use. Nuage Aqueous Lotion is a non-greasy moisturiser. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months. Suitable for use on the body and to treat and prevent dry chapped lips. Nuage is a trusted popular brand, search amazon.co.uk to view other available products. Pump dispensing bottle, contains 250ml
